It is associated with a Persian Gulf flood.
It is associated with a Black Sea Deluge 7,500 years ago.

It was built in the seventh century BCE.
It was built in the third century BCE.
CausedBy: It is caused by God's judgment on wicked humanity.
It is caused by divine caprice.
It is caused by the need to reduce human overpopulation.
ConsistsOf: It consists of three internal divisions.
It consists of three decks.
It consists of a door in the side.
It consists of a tsohar.
It consists of a roof or a skylight.
It consists of a square pyramid floating on a raft.
It consists of a ship's hull with a sloped roof and a side door.
It consists of one or two decks.
It consists of six decks of seven compartments.
It consists of compartments divided into nine subcompartments.

It was created around the third century BCE.

It was created in the Babylonian exile.
CreatedTo: It was created to spare Noah, his family, and one pair of every animal species in the world from a global deluge.

It has a roof or a skylight.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by its dimensions.
It is characterized by its three internal divisions.
It is characterized by its three decks.
It is characterized by a door in the side.
It is characterized by a tsohar.
It is characterized by being made of gopher wood.
It is characterized by being smeared with koper.
It is characterized by its rectangular shape.
It is characterized by its near-identical deck areas to other arks.
It is characterized by its circular shape.
It is characterized by its cubic shape.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by earlier Mesopotamian flood myths.
It was influenced by the myth of Utnapishtim in the Epic of Gilgamesh.
It was influenced by the circumstances of the end of the Third Dynasty of Ur.
It was influenced by the restoration of order by the First Dynasty of Isin.

It is known as the ark of bulrushes.

It is known for its dimensions.
It is known for its three internal divisions.
It is known for its three decks.
It is known for being made of gopher wood.
It is known for being smeared with koper.
It is known for its parallels with Babylonian flood heroes.
OccurredDuring: It occurred during the Genesis flood narrative.

It occurred during the end of the Third Dynasty of Ur.
It occurred during the Babylonian exile.
OccurredIn: It occurred in the Old Babylonian Empire period.
